claims.summary: The 48-dimensional codec projection has a defined anatomy that should remain inspectable.
claims.disposition: verify projection anatomy, per-block evidence, and narrative diagnostics

claims.summary: Deterministic projection does not by itself establish felt adequacy.
claims.disposition: verify determinism, shadow comparison, substance-fit, and collision diagnostics

claims.summary: Lexical complexity may carry different felt weight than emotionally direct wording.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline word-pair projection comparison

claims.summary: A reserved structural-friction dimension could alter live semantic representation.
claims.disposition: gate any live feature-layout change behind protocol review and scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval

claims.summary: Changing FEATURE_ABS_MAX would alter the live codec ceiling.
claims.disposition: gate any live feature-ceiling change behind replay evidence, canary bounds, and scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval

claims.summary: Synchronizing vibrancy or shadow directly into live codec gain would change transport behavior.
claims.disposition: gate any gain or live feature synchronization behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval and abort criteria
